data.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried.

data.description: Goblins are small, black-hearted humanoids that lair in despoiled dungeons and other dismal settings.
